scripts.coverage: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/test-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build.mjs && c8 --all --src dist --include 'dist/**/*.js' --reporter=text --reporter=html --reports-dir coverage node scripts/test-extension.mjs
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/test-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build.mjs && node scripts/test-extension.mjs
